name: Iaptic
description: Unified receipt validation and subscription management service for Apple, Google Play, Microsoft, Braintree and Stripe.

seo.title: Iaptic — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Iaptic: Unified receipt validation and subscription management service for Apple, Google Play, Microsoft, Braintree and Stripe.

when_to_use: Unified receipt validation across Apple, Google Play, and Stripe subscriptions
Subscription status tracking and entitlement management across all stores
Server-side receipt verification for anti-fraud in IAP-based subscription apps
Migration path for apps moving from single-store to multi-store IAP validation

pros: Unified receipt validation across five major stores
Simplifies subscription logic for cross-platform apps
Server-side handling avoids client trust issues
Reasonable pricing vs RevenueCat at volume
cons: Smaller brand vs RevenueCat and Adapty
Feature depth on paywalls and analytics is limited
Docs and SDK polish vary by platform
review.verdict: Pragmatic multi-store receipt validator for teams who want cross-platform subs without RevenueCat's price tag.
review.best_for: Cross-platform apps validating subs across Apple, Google, Microsoft, Stripe.
review.not_for: Teams wanting full paywall, experimentation and analytics in one tool.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
